messages.content: 进行美式英文翻译：本项工作研究的方式拓宽了陶瓷材料参与人机交互的实践探索范围，本文给出了瓷板画环境检测系统构建和用户体验的早期探索。尝试了陶瓷美学价值作品可以通过人机交互形式实现。我们得出结论是，在系统能够自动检测和净化空气，营造优质空气质量氛围下，参与者可以根据自身的喜好搭配不同款式的香味和瓷板画、音乐效果进行体验。通过我们在此的初步研究，我们希望可以促成更多美学价值作品与人机交互结合的可能性，为研究界向前驱动提供一份可查询资料。

The approach used in this study has broadened the scope of practical exploration in which ceramic materials can be involved in human-computer interaction. This paper presents an early exploration of the construction of a porcelain painting environment detection system and user experience. It attempts to demonstrate that ceramic aesthetic works can be realized through human-computer interaction. We conclude that participants can experience different styles of fragrances, porcelain paintings, and music effects according to their preferences in an atmosphere where the system can automatically detect and purify the air, creating a high-quality air quality environment. Through our preliminary research, we hope to contribute to the possibility of combining more aesthetic works with human-computer interaction, providing a searchable resource for driving the research community forward.
美式英文翻译：我们的结论是，参与者可以根据自己的喜好，在系统可以自动检测和净化空气的氛围中体验不同风格的香氛、瓷画和音乐效果，从而创造出高质量的空气质量环境。

Our conclusion is that participants can experience different styles of fragrances, porcelain paintings, and music effects according to their preferences in an atmosphere where the system can automatically detect and purify the air, thus creating a high-quality air quality environment.

美式英文翻译：这次初步研究工作提出了瓷板画检测系统的升级提出了几个关键的问题，通过不同人群调查，可以探索出不同人群、不同性别之中会对香味的喜好和瓷板画作品、音乐种类持不同意见。这给系统的下一次升级提供了方向——观察不同人群的喜好，提供可以根据不同人群的喜爱种类挑选不同款式香味和瓷板画效果、音乐种类。这也就意味着，当用户返回体验时，根据自己挑选喜爱款式，准确快速进行搭配，这种更换的动态条件可以帮助用户更加快速提升体验感。

This preliminary research work raised several key questions and proposed upgrades for the porcelain painting detection system. Through surveys conducted with different demographics, it was found that different groups and genders have varying preferences for fragrances, porcelain painting works, and types of music. This provides a direction for the next upgrade of the system, observing the preferences of different groups and offering the ability to select different styles of fragrances, porcelain painting effects, and music based on individual preferences. This means that when users return for the experience, they can quickly and accurately choose their preferred style, enhancing their experience more rapidly. This dynamic condition of customization can help users enhance their experience quickly.

美式英文翻译：这项研究采用不同群体进行测试的方法，虽然设定了香味和瓷版画作品、音乐为不变的条件。但是，通过四个人群给出了不同的体验意见结果总结是：
（1）小孩和中年组人群满意程度高于青少年和老人组。
（2）小孩和中年组人群感性程度、联想性都比较高。
（3）人群体验讨论较多因素的是瓷板画效果、香味喜好、音乐播放效果。
虽然人群都偏于感性的参与，但是我们本次实验系统设定的条件是不变的。参与者反馈的体验喜好给出不同的评价机制，有些人群偏向喜欢，有些人群不赞成这种味道和作品、音乐的搭配。大多数人群给出的不同意见的是味道和瓷板画作品、音乐种类的搭配问题。可以得出结果的是，把系统中瓷板画、香味种类、音乐风格设定为可调整的因素，我们可以设定一些自由更换的设备条件，满足用户的喜好这些条件后，我们的系统部件可以改造成方便更换和调整的条件。

This research utilized testing with different demographics, despite setting the conditions of fragrance, porcelain painting works, and music as constant variables. However, through the feedback from four different demographic groups, the following conclusions were drawn:

(1) Children and middle-aged groups showed higher satisfaction levels compared to teenagers and elderly groups.
(2) Children and middle-aged groups demonstrated higher levels of sensitivity and association.
(3) Factors discussed among the groups included porcelain painting effects, fragrance preferences, and music playback effects.

Although the participants from all demographics leaned towards a more sensitive engagement, the conditions set in our experiment remained unchanged. The feedback on the experiential preferences varied among the groups, with some favoring the combination of fragrances, artworks, and music, while others expressed disagreement. The majority of differing opinions were related to the pairing of fragrances, porcelain painting works, and music genres. As a result, by allowing adjustable factors such as porcelain paintings, fragrance types, and music styles in the system, we can set up a mechanism for users to freely change these conditions. This transformation would make it convenient for system components to accommodate users' preferences through interchangeable and adjustable conditions.

美式英文翻译（现在完成时态语法结构）：本项工作研究的方式拓宽了陶瓷材料参与人机交互的实践探索范围，本文给出了瓷板画环境检测系统构建和用户体验的早期探索。尝试了陶瓷美学价值作品可以通过人机交互形式实现。我们得出结论是，在系统能够自动检测和净化空气，营造优质空气质量氛围下，参与者可以根据自身的喜好搭配不同款式的香味和瓷板画、音乐效果进行体验。通过我们在此的初步研究，我们希望可以促成更多美学价值作品与人机交互结合的可能性，为研究界向前驱动提供一份可查询资料。

This work has expanded the scope of practical exploration in which ceramic materials can participate in human-computer interaction. This paper has presented an early exploration of the construction of a porcelain painting environment detection system and user experience. It has attempted to demonstrate that ceramic aesthetic works can be realized through human-computer interaction. We have concluded that, in an atmosphere where the system is able to automatically detect and purify the air, creating a high-quality air quality environment, participants can experience different styles of fragrances, porcelain paintings, and music effects according to their preferences. Through our preliminary research, we hope to have facilitated the possibility of combining more aesthetic works with human-computer interaction, providing a searchable resource to drive the research community forward.

美式英文翻译（现在完成时态语法结构）：本项工作研究的方式拓宽了陶瓷材料参与人机交互的实践探索范围，本文给出了瓷板画环境检测系统构建和用户体验的早期探索。尝试了陶瓷美学价值作品可以通过人机交互形式实现。我们得出结论和下一步研究方向是，在系统能够自动检测和净化空气，营造优质空气质量氛围下，参与者可以根据自身的喜好搭配不同款式的香味和瓷板画、音乐效果进行体验。通过我们在此的初步研究，我们希望可以促成更多美学价值作品与人机交互结合的可能性，为研究界向前驱动提供一份可查询资料。

This work has expanded the scope of practical exploration in which ceramic materials can participate in human-computer interaction. This paper has provided an early exploration of the construction of a porcelain painting environment detection system and user experience. It has attempted to demonstrate that ceramic aesthetic works can be realized through human-computer interaction. We have drawn conclusions and identified the next steps in our research. In an atmosphere where the system is able to automatically detect and purify the air, creating a high-quality air quality environment, participants can experience different styles of fragrances, porcelain paintings, and music effects according to their preferences. Through our preliminary research, we hope to have facilitated the possibility of combining more aesthetic works with human-computer interaction, providing a searchable resource to drive the research community forward.

美式英文翻译（将来时态的语法结构）：这一初步研究工作提出了瓷板画检测系统的升级提出了几个关键的问题，通过不同人群调查，可以探索出不同人群、不同性别之中会对香味的喜好和瓷板画作品、音乐种类持不同意见。这给系统的下一次升级提供了方向——观察不同人群的喜好，提供可以根据不同人群的喜爱种类挑选不同款式香味和瓷板画效果、音乐种类。这也就意味着，当用户返回体验时，根据自己挑选喜爱款式，准确快速进行搭配，这种更换的动态条件可以帮助用户更加快速提升体验感。

This preliminary research work will propose upgrades for the porcelain painting detection system and address several key questions. By conducting surveys with different demographics, we will explore the varying preferences for fragrances, porcelain painting works, and types of music among different groups and genders. This will provide direction for the next upgrade of the system – observing the preferences of different groups and offering the ability to select different styles of fragrances, porcelain painting effects, and music based on individual preferences. This also implies that when users return for the experience, they can accurately and quickly match their preferred styles, leveraging the dynamic condition of customization to help enhance the user's experience more rapidly.

美式英文翻译：这一初步研究工作提出了瓷板画检测系统的升级提出了几个关键的问题，通过不同人群调查，可以探索出不同人群、不同性别之中会对香味的喜好和瓷板画作品、音乐种类持不同意见。这给系统的下一次升级提供了方向——观察不同人群的喜好，提供可以根据不同人群的喜爱种类挑选不同款式香味和瓷板画效果、音乐种类。这也就意味着，当用户返回体验时，根据自己挑选喜爱款式，准确快速进行搭配，这种更换的动态条件可以帮助用户更加快速提升体验感。

This preliminary research work proposes upgrades for the porcelain painting detection system and addresses several key questions. By conducting surveys with different demographics, we aim to explore the varying preferences for fragrances, porcelain painting works, and types of music among different groups and genders. This will provide direction for the next upgrade of the system – observing the preferences of different demographics and offering the ability to select different styles of fragrances, porcelain painting effects, and music based on individual preferences. As a result, when users return for the experience, they can accurately and quickly match their preferred styles, leveraging the dynamic condition of customization to help enhance the user's experience more rapidly.
美式英文翻译：首先我们需要在同一个空间场所进行检测实验，检测交互系统运行的可行性。然后，我们现场利用不同群体来体验瓷板画环境检测系统，同时将体验感反馈出来。我们选择群体用户研究方法，潜在的好处是每个用户具备有不同的审美和感受，具备感性的个体，带来不同体验结果，更能检测此系统的适用人群范围。

Firstly, we need to conduct testing experiments in the same physical space to assess the feasibility of the interactive system. Then, we will invite different groups to experience the porcelain painting environment detection system on-site and gather their feedback on the user experience. We have chosen a group-based user research method, as the potential benefit is that each user possesses different aesthetics and sensibilities. These diverse individuals will contribute to varied experiential outcomes, enabling us to better assess the applicability of the system to different user groups.
美式英文翻译：首先我们需要在同一个空间场所进行检测实验，检测交互系统运行的可行性。然后，我们现场利用不同群体来体验瓷板画环境检测系统，同时将体验感反馈出来。我们选择群体用户研究方法，潜在的好处是每个用户具备有不同的审美和感受，具备感性的个体，带来不同体验结果，更能检测此系统的适用性。

Firstly, we need to conduct testing experiments in the same physical space to assess the feasibility of the interactive system. Then, we will invite different groups to experience the porcelain painting environment detection system on-site and provide feedback on their experience. We have chosen a group-based user research method, as the potential benefit is that each user possesses different aesthetics and sensibilities. These individuals with diverse perceptions will contribute to varying experiential outcomes, allowing us to better assess the applicability of this system.
美式英文翻译（一般过去时态语法结构）：首先我们需要在同一个空间场所进行检测实验，检测交互系统运行的可行性。然后，我们现场利用不同群体来体验瓷板画环境检测系统，同时将体验感反馈出来。我们选择群体用户研究方法，潜在的好处是每个用户具备有不同的审美和感受，具备感性的个体，带来不同体验结果，更能检测此系统的适用性。

Firstly, we needed to conduct testing experiments in the same physical space to assess the feasibility of the interactive system. Then, we invited different groups to experience the porcelain painting environment detection system on-site and provided feedback on their experience. We chose a group-based user research method, as the potential benefit was that each user possessed different aesthetics and sensibilities. These individuals, with diverse perceptions and sensibilities, brought forth different experiential outcomes, enabling us to better evaluate the applicability of this system.
